getAuditTrail(uint256).notice: Get the complete audit trail for one application

getEntry(uint256,uint256).notice: Get a specific audit entry for an application

getEntryCount(uint256).notice: Get total number of events logged for an application

getGlobalLog(uint256,uint256).notice: Get a slice of the global log (for auditors paginating)

globalLogCount().notice: Get total events in the global system log

grantMultipleRoles(bytes32[],address).notice: Convenience: grant multiple roles to one account (admin only)

grantRole(bytes32,address).notice: Grant a role to an account (admin only)

hasRole(bytes32,address).notice: Check if an account has a specific role

logEvent(uint256,address,uint8,string).notice: Log an audit event — called by PensionRegistry only

renounceRole(bytes32).notice: An account can voluntarily renounce their own role

revokeRole(bytes32,address).notice: Revoke a role from an account (admin only)

verifyEntry(uint256,uint256,address,uint.notice: Verify if a specific entry hash matches expected values
